title: hieracium dermophyllum subsp. juranigenum
intro: Hieracium dermophyllum subsp. juranigenum is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), specifically a subspecies of Hieracium dermophyllum. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating digestive issues and its potential anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Hieracium dermophyllum subsp. juranigenum include its ability to support the treatment of ulcers, gastritis, and other gastrointestinal problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Traditional herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and overall well-being.
